zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Meade於1515年6月26日出生在英國艾可可拉維林時，他的父親Thomas Meade13歲，母親Joan Wycliffe17歲。他於1545年9月6日與Lady Margaret Gouldhurst在英國賀特福爾沃特福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1559年2月10日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾沃特福德享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Meade于1515年6月26日出生在英国艾可可拉維林时，他的父亲Thomas Meade13岁，母亲Joan Wycliffe17岁。他于1545年9月6日与Lady Margaret Gouldhurst在英国賀特福爾沃特福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1559年2月10日在英国英格兰賀特福爾沃特福德享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Meade was born on 26 June 1515, in Clavering, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Meade, was 13 and his mother, Joan Wycliffe, was 17. He married Lady Margaret Gouldhurst on 6 September 1545, in St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 February 1559, in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Meade est né le 26 juin 1515, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Meade, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Joan Wycliffe, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Gouldhurst le 6 septembre 1545, à St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 février 1559, à Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

September 1545 in St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire, England Lady Margaret Gouldhurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Gouldhurst il 6 settembre 1545, nel St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 febbraio 1559, nel Watford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Meadeが1515年6月26日にイギリスエセックスクラバーイングで生まれた時，父Thomas Meadeは13歳，母Joan Wycliffeは17歳であった。1545年9月6日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードスト マリ'ス チャーチでLady Margaret Gouldhurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1559年2月10日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードで43歳で死去した。

ko.St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire: 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Meade(이)가 1515년 6월 26일 영국 에세스 클레이버링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Meade(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Wycliffe(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1545년 9월 6일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 Lady Margaret Gouldhurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Meade nasceu em 26 de junho de 1515, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Meade, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Joan Wycliffe, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Gouldhurst em 6 de setembro de 1545, em St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1559, em Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire: ст мэри'с чурч, ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Meade родился 26 июня 1515 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Meade было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Wycliffe, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Gouldhurst 6 сентября 1545 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 февраля 1559 г. в местности ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

Se casó con Lady Margaret Gouldhurst el 6 de septiembre de 1545, en St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1559, en Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
